title: DMGplus
description: This is a custom mod for Dan's Minigames.
body:
This is a mod which improves performance for the event Dan's Minigames. This mod is required to be able to play on Dan's Minigames.

Current features:
- No delay Block Dash. Walls are fully client sided. Removes wall rubberbanding and gives perfect wall knockback.
- No delay Jumppads.
